name: @search
description: Code search and symbol lookup. Includes grep, egrep, find, and locate commands. Pattern matching and result ranking with O(1) instant indexing.

name: @file_discovery
description: File and directory traversal. Implements find, tree, and locate operations for filesystem navigation and file pattern discovery.

name: @analytics
description: Intent tracking and learning analytics. Captures tool usage patterns, monitors semantic domain predictions, and analyzes code access patterns.

name: @repositories
description: Git repository operations and management. Handles repo listing, status checking, and repository configuration across projects.

name: @cli_architecture
description: Command-line interface design and implementation. Shell script organization, argument parsing, and command routing across 90-main.sh and subcommands.

name: @indexing
description: Code indexing and symbol extraction. Manages indexer.py, tree_sitter parsing, and semantic tag generation for fast lookup.

name: @gateway
description: API gateway and HTTP service. Provides REST endpoints for search, intent tracking, and domain management on localhost:8080.

name: @domain_learning
description: Semantic domain generation and management. Creates project-specific domains from codebase structure and manages domain assignment to orphan keywords.

name: @installation
description: Setup and installation procedures. Manages install.sh, shell integration, hook installation, and Docker deployment.

name: @docker_deployment
description: Docker containerization and orchestration. Handles Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml, and multi-service orchestration for gateway, index, and status services.

name: @status_service
description: Service health monitoring and status reporting. Tracks service availability, performance metrics, and provides health check endpoints.

name: @hooks
description: Claude Code hooks integration. System for triggering Haiku tasks, learning events, and intent capture without API keys.

name: @configuration
description: Settings and environment configuration. Manages project-domains.json, settings.template.json, and environment variable handling across services.

name: @redis_cache
description: In-memory caching and data persistence. Uses Redis for domain storage, intent caching, and fast access to frequently used data.

name: @rest_api
description: REST API design and HTTP request handling. Endpoints for symbol search, multi-term queries, intent reporting, and domain statistics.

name: @python_services
description: Python service implementations. Includes learner.py, gateway.py, and indexer.py for backend processing and API serving.

name: @shell_integration
description: Shell prompt integration and status line. Implements aoa-status-line.sh for displaying context and intent information in terminal.

name: @intent_capture
description: User intent tracking and prediction. Captures what code is being accessed and predicts next tools or files needed through semantic analysis.

name: @build_system
description: Build and compilation process. Manages cli/build.sh for generating cli/aoa from source shell fragments and build automation.

name: @performance_optimization
description: Speed and efficiency optimization. Implements O(1) search, parallel processing, and minimizes tool call overhead.

name: @error_handling
description: Error handling and debugging. Manages exit codes, error messages, and debug output for CLI and service failures.

name: @testing
description: Test infrastructure and validation. Includes test setup, health checks, and verification of service operations.

name: @documentation
description: Project documentation and guides. README files, USAGE.md, and inline documentation for users and developers.

name: @command_utilities
description: Helper functions and utilities. Implements common operations like file reading, JSON parsing, and string manipulation across CLI.
